name: altheia-sdk-monorepo
description: Altheia open-source TypeScript packages — SDK, MCP server, framework adapters, types.

scripts.publish:all: pnpm -r build && pnpm --filter @altheia/types publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @altheia/sdk publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @altheia/solana-agent-kit publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @altheia/mcp publish --access public --no-git-checks
